name: Atomic fair-exchange / bilateral simultaneity (pay⟺release, DvP, atomic swap, escrow) — the one named CC 1.7 falsification target; bridges to a settlement rail
Imperative physical-world actuation (unlock door, shut valve, shed load) — authorization is in-grammar but CEG cannot BE the effect; needs a designed effect-rail mirroring settlement_ref

High-volume continuous sensor/telemetry streaming subject_kind — point readings fit but IoT/telematics/env/smart-meter high-rate ingestion has no first-class shape (and fine-GPS collides with rough-only ≤res7)
Realtime convergent-merge primitive (CRDT/OT/LWW) for collaborative editing/multiplayer — transport is in-grammar, convergence is deliberately app-layer
Secret / coercion-resistant receipt-free anonymous voting — attestations are signed/attributable by design; needs future ZK composition

Proof of unique personhood / biometric uniqueness — bounded by bond+witness_diversity+RATCHET but unsolvable in-grammar because biometric_inference and surveillance_mass are prohibited apophatic categories
Hardware-rooted attestation chain — hardware_class is self-asserted; needs normative TPM-quote/Apple/FIDO verification (R5)
Native property/title/deed and movable-asset subject_kind + registry component — record SHAPE is pure in-grammar vocabulary but unbuilt (the cleanest greenfield extension)
Conditional / event-triggered execution (will-on-death, dead-man's-switch, posthumous key release) — delegates_to is immediate/unconditional; needs a liveness-oracle + conditional-trigger design

Real-time safety-critical control loops (SCADA, autonomous-vehicle control, closed-loop infusion) — append-only/monotonic semantics fundamentally mismatch sub-second control; out of scope by constitutional design

Authoritative balance / proof-of-reserves / settlement finality / clearing-netting / order-book matching — all need a totally-ordered ledger the fabric deliberately refuses; bridge to chain/exchange rails

Ranked relevance / semantic search and recommendation compute — directory + citation graph + eigentrust composition is in-grammar, but the ranking/personalization model is the deferred (excluded) agent
